## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context. Explain the motivation for this PR and what problems it solves.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring or code cleanup
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

Which language packages are affected by this change?
- [ ] jsvim (JavaScript/TypeScript)
- [ ] jvim (Java)
- [ ] sharpvim (C#)
- [ ] rustvim (Rust)
- [ ] zvim (Zig)

## Testing

Describe the testing you've performed:

- [ ] Built the package: `nix build .#<package>`
- [ ] Ran the configuration: `nix run .#<package>`
- [ ] Verified LSP works: `:LspInfo` in Neovim
- [ ] Tested formatting: `<leader>FF` (if formatting was modified)
- [ ] Tested debugging: `F5` (if debug configuration was modified)
- [ ] Tested linting (if linting was modified)
- [ ] Verified no regressions in other packages
- [ ] Ran `:checkhealth` to verify no errors
